inputs.label: Heart Girth (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure the circumference of the horse's chest just behind the elbows and withers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure the circumference of the horse's chest just behind the elbows and withers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atın göğsünün çevresini dirseklerin ve omuzların hemen arkasından ölçün.
businessContext_i18n.de: Messen Sie den Umfang der Pferdebrust direkt hinter den Ellbogen und dem Widerrist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurez la circonférence du poitrail du cheval juste derrière les coudes et le garrot.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mida la circunferencia del pecho del caballo justo detrás de los codos y la cruz.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قم بقياس محيط صدر الحصان خلف المرفقين والكتفين مباشرة.

inputs.label: Body Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure from the point of shoulder to the point of buttock in a straight line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure from the point of shoulder to the point of buttock in a straight line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Omuz noktasından kalça noktasına düz bir çizgide ölçün.
businessContext_i18n.de: Messen Sie vom Schulterpunkt bis zum Gesäßpunkt in einer geraden Linie.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurez du point de l'épaule au point de la fesse en ligne droite.
businessContext_i18n.es: Mida desde el punto del hombro hasta el punto de la nalga en línea recta.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قم بالقياس من نقطة الكتف إلى نقطة الردف في خط مستقيم.

inputs.label: Height at Withers (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Measure from the ground to the highest point of the withers (optional).

businessContext_i18n.en: Measure from the ground to the highest point of the withers (optional).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yerden omuzların en yüksek noktasına kadar ölçün (isteğe bağlı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Messen Sie vom Boden bis zum höchsten Punkt des Widerrists (optional).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesurez du sol au point le plus haut du garrot (optionnel).
businessContext_i18n.es: Mida desde el suelo hasta el punto más alto de la cruz (opcional).
businessContext_i18n.ar: قم بالقياس من الأرض إلى أعلى نقطة في الكتفين (اختياري).

inputs.label: Age (years)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the horse in years (optional).

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the horse in years (optional).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
